backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Mitsubishi dealer backend, defining all data stores (vehicles, variants, colors, promotions, blog posts, media, visitor stats, etc.), type definitions, and including authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing 1–2 sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS entry file for the frontend.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers, and guards admin routes with AuthGuard.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating or editing admin users, validating Principal ID format and submitting create/update mutations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with their principal ID, role badge, creation date, and edit/delete action buttons, disabling delete when only one admin remains.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component that lets admins pick a banner image (main or CTA) from existing media assets, displaying them in a radio-group grid and returning the selected asset ID.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form for creating or editing blog posts, with delegation identity validation before submitting create/update mutations to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Displays a table of all blog posts with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status using corresponding React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Renders a grid of uploaded media assets with blob URL previews, copy-ID, and delete functionality, including delegation identity and actor validation before destructive actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload zone supporting images and PDFs up to 10MB, with per-file progress tracking and identity/actor validation before uploading to the canister.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: A dialog form component for creating or editing a passenger vehicle, with fields for name, description, and base price, using create/update vehicle mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all passenger vehicles with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a promotion, with fields for title, description, start date, and end date, using create/update promotion mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all promotions with their period and active status, supporting edit, delete, and active status toggle actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: A dialog form for creating or editing a testimonial, with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1–5), using create/update testimonial mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating, with edit and delete action buttons delegated via props.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most-visited pages using Recharts, with loading skeleton and empty-state handling. Accepts URL/count pairs as bigint tuples and truncates long URLs for display.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Displays a line chart of visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts, converting bigint nanosecond timestamps to formatted dates. Includes loading skeleton and empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks Internet Identity delegation validity, syncs the principal to localStorage, clears stale tokens on expiry, and redirects unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Renders a static list of five latest article links that navigate to individual blog post pages via TanStack Router. Each item is displayed as a clickable button with a file icon.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom action bar with Call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and navigation menu buttons. The menu button toggles a dropdown of site navigation links that closes on outside click.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Renders a set of toggle buttons for selecting a vehicle variant, defaulting to the first variant and notifying the parent via a callback whenever the selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Full-width CTA banner section that loads a configurable banner image from website settings (authenticated users only) and displays a WhatsApp contact link derived from settings. Falls back to a static image if no asset is available.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer displaying dealer contact info, social media links, visitor stats (auto-refreshed every 15 seconds), and quick navigation links, all populated dynamically from website settings with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Page hero banner that maps the current pathname to a title, icon, background color, and subtitle, rendering different configurations for each major section of the site. Text color switches to black for Mobil Niaga pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel section of up to 8 family car (Mobil Keluarga) vehicle catalog entries fetched via `useGetAllVehicleCatalogs`, showing a loading state while data is being retrieved.
Displays a carousel section of up to 8 commercial vehicle (Mobil Niaga) catalog entries fetched via `useGetAllVehicleCatalogs`, with a loading fallback state.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main hero banner section using a configurable banner image (loaded from media assets if authenticated, otherwise a static fallback) and displays the site name from website settings.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with the site logo, desktop menu links, and a mobile hamburger menu that closes when clicking outside.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Renders like and share buttons for a vehicle product, tracking counts via `useProductInteractions` and triggering the native Web Share API on share.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicles (Produk Unggulan) fetched from the vehicle catalog, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Provides a search input that redirects to the `/mobil-keluarga` page with a query parameter when the user submits a search term.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section displaying three dealership selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section with a brief description of Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an authorized Mitsubishi dealer.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component allowing users to choose a vehicle variant and color from provided lists, notifying the parent via a callback on selection change.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying a vehicle's placeholder image, name, formatted base price in IDR, and a link to the vehicle detail page.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian-language translation constants for UI labels, validation messages, and success/error/confirmation messages used throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with an authenticated identity if available and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Custom hook that queries admin dashboard statistics via the backend actor; currently returns hardcoded zero values as a placeholder since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting admin users via the backend actor, using `protectedCall` for authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for blog post CRUD and publish-toggle operations; all mutation and query functions are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD; all backend methods are missing so queries return empty/null and mutations log warnings without calling the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a contact form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the submitted data, with backward-compatibility aliases exported.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting contact submissions; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a credit simulation form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the data, with backward-compatibility aliases exported.
Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting credit simulations; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing login, logout, identity state, and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, uploading, and deleting media assets via the backend actor, with progress callback support on upload and `protectedCall` for authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for product like/share counts and mutations; all backend methods are missing so queries return zero and mutations are no-ops, with a combined convenience hook for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions (get, create, update, delete, toggle active status), all stubbed out as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all vehicle catalogs and a single vehicle with its catalog, both returning empty/null stubs since backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a single React Query hook to fetch website settings from the backend actor, returning null on error.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials (get, create, update, delete), all stubbed out as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on vehicles (get all, get by id, create, update, delete, toggle publish, get catalog), all stubbed since backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch visitor stats (active), visitor trend, and page views (both disabled pending backend implementation).
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now does nothing, as tracking has been moved to PublicLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings via the backend actor, with protected mutation requiring an authenticated identity.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile support, click-outside collapse, and a logout handler that clears query cache and redirects to login.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing page layout that wraps content with Navbar, optional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar, and handles visitor tracking on each route change via the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Admin page for managing admin users with list, add, edit, and delete functionality using a dialog and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog posts with add/edit dialog and React Query cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles that displays a notice directing users to the passenger vehicles menu.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page that fetches and displays all credit simulation submissions in a sortable table with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard page showing summary stat cards (vehicles, blog posts, leads, media, visitors) fetched via useAdminStats.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists all contact/lead submissions sorted by timestamp in a table with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin media manager page with an upload zone and asset grid, invalidating the mediaAssets cache on successful upload.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles with a list view and add/edit dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with a list view and add/edit dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit dialog and a confirmation alert dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin page that displays real-time visitor statistics (total, daily, weekly, monthly, online now, page views) with auto-refresh every 15 seconds, plus trend and top-pages charts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for editing website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images, with form state synced from backend and identity validation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, syncs an auth token on success, and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple section components including banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for a blog article detail view, currently showing an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for the blog listing view, currently showing an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for visitor inquiries (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, DP, tenor, message) that submits via the useContactForm hook.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for a family car, showing vehicle info, variant/color selector, pricing, specs, features tabs, and interaction buttons, looked up by slug from the catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page for family cars, fetching all vehicle catalogs and displaying up to 8 vehicles in a responsive grid using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public listing page for commercial vehicles filtered by category slug, displaying up to 8 vehicles in a grid with a category heading.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Public detail page for a commercial vehicle, showing vehicle info, variant selector, pricing, specs, features tabs, and interaction buttons, looked up by slug and category from the catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Displays a grid of three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to the respective category route.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page for promotions that shows a 'under development' message and directs users to contact sales.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form page that lets users select a vehicle, enter down payment and tenor, calculates estimated monthly installments, and submits the simulation via a mutation hook.
Placeholder page for customer testimonials that shows an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces for frontend use that mirror backend types, covering entities like Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleCatalog, AdminUser, CreditSimulation, and more.
frontend/src/utils/apiClient.ts: Provides a centralized ICP canister call wrapper with pre-call authentication validation, authorization error handling, and session management utilities for login/logout token sync.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting canister-stored Uint8Array blob data into browser-displayable object URLs and checking MIME types for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Exports a single function that calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/tokenStorage.ts: Manages authentication state persistence in localStorage by storing, retrieving, validating, and clearing the Internet Identity principal ID and session expiry metadata.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides form validation utility functions (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) and a `validateDelegationIdentity` function that checks ICP identity validity, including expiration and anonymous principal detection.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Provides browser-side visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/persistence, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state and pending authorization fix tasks (AR-1 through AR-9+) for a Motoko/ICP backend, focusing on restricting `addAdmin`, `deleteAdmin`, and `updateAdminRole` to `#super_admin` only, with a hardcoded principal bypass for `updateAdminRole`.
